title: Trait method return type doesn't match declaration
explanation: This error occurs when the return type of a trait method implementation does not match what the trait declared. All method signatures in an impl block must exactly match the trait definition.
error_message: error[E0053]: method `build` has an incompatible type for trait

fixes.description: Use associated types for flexible return types

tip: If you need different return types for different implementations, use associated types in the trait definition.
